LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS SHERAE DRAKE, STARR WILLIAMS & MARCUS HAYES' MOTION 1) FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVING CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT 2) AUTHORIZING DISTRIBUTION OF NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT 3) SETTING SCHEDULE FOR FINAL APPROVAL PROCESS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 20, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 7, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S NON-OPPOSITION, THE JOINT STIPULATION OF SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE, AND STURDEVANT SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION FILED ON APRIL 30, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFFS SHERAE DRAKE, STARR WILLIAMS & MARCUS HAYES' MOTION 1) FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVING CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT 2) AUTHORIZING DISTRIBUTION OF NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT 3) SETTING SCHEDULE FOR FINAL APPROVAL PROCESS WAS HEARD THIS DAY. THE COURT STATED ON THE RECORD THE REVISIONS REQUIRED ON THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT AND THE CHANGES THAT NEEDED TO BE DONE ON THE PROPOSED ORDER. HEARING FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS SET FOR SEPTEMBER 27, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. PARTIES TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S MOTION TO DISMISS CLASS ALLEGATIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED ON OR AFTER JULY 2, 2012 IF PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT, BY THAT DATE, FILED A MOTION FOR CLASS CERTIFICATION. BALANCING THE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES, WHILE THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION NOT TO HEAR THE MOTION AT THIS TIME, THE TIMING OF THE DETERMINATION OF THE PROPRIETY OF CLASS CERTIFICATION IS NOT SOLELY LEFT TO PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL. GIVEN THAT THE CASE HAS BEEN PENDING OVER A YEAR, THE NEXT FOUR MONTHS SHOULD AFFORD BOTH SIDES AMPLE OPPORTUNITY TO DO WHAT IS NEEDED TO HAVE THE PROPRIETY OF CLASS CERTIFICATION DETERMINED ON A FULL EVIDENTIARY RECORD. Mtn To Strike Deft'S Reply Brief In Supp Of Its Mtn To Dismiss Class Allegations
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James C. Sturdevant, Esq., of The Sturdevant Law Firm, Tel. 415.477.2410, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
William F. Murphy, Esq. and Anna Mary Gannon, Esq., of Dillingham & Murphy, LLP, Tel. 415.397.2700, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS SHERAE DRAKE, STARR WILLIAMS and MARCUS HAYES' Motion To Strike Defendants' Reply Brief In Support Of Its Motion To Dismiss Class Allegations is Off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion to dismiss class allegations. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MOTION Motion To Dismiss Class Allegations
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William F. Murphy, Esq. and Anna Mary Gannon, Esq., of Dillingham & Murphy, LLP, Tel. 415.397.2700, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
James C. Sturdevant, Esq., of The Sturdevant Law Firm, Tel. 415.477.2410, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S Motion To Dismiss Class Allegations is Denied without prejudice to being re-filed on or after July 2, 2012 if Plaintiffs have not, by that date, filed a motion for class certification. Balancing the interests of the parties, while the court exercises its discretion not to hear the motion at this time, the timing of the determination of the propriety of class certification is not solely left to plaintiffs' counsel. Given that the case has been pending over a year, the next four months should afford both sides ample opportunity to do what is needed to have the propriety of class certification determined on a full evidentiary record. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
